description: scope_code publishes (FactKey::CodeScoped(id), world.code_revision(id)) — pinning CodeScoped's revision to CodeIndexed's. Every other fact gets an independent revision via reconcile. CodeScoped is a distinct event (imports resolved, names bound) and should produce its own revision. code_revision() is vestigial once fixed.
title: fz-knf-b: give CodeScoped its own revision instead of borrowing CodeIndexed's
